news_items.headline: OpenAI launches GPT-5.4 Mini and Nano, opening era of sub-agents
news_items.summary:
OpenAI launches GPT-5.4 Mini and Nano, opening era of sub-agents

OpenAI [Photo: Shutterstock]

[DigitalToday reporter Hwang Chi-gyu (황치규)] OpenAI has unveiled two small models designed to handle delegated tasks in AI agent systems. They are GPT-5.4 Mini and Nano.

The two models focus on codebase search, file review and parallel subtasks that need fast, low-cost processing.

## Temasek's Xora Innovation leads NeuBird AI's $19.3M funding

April 8, 2026• AI, News, Singapore•

NeuBird AI, the US-based agentic artificial intelligence (AI) for production operations, has announced $19.3 million in an oversubscribed funding round led by new investor Xora Innovation, a Singapore-based deep tech venture capital firm backed by Temasek Holdings.

Microsoft just hit a significant milestone. On April 3, the company announced version 1.0 of its Microsoft Agent Framework — a production-ready, open-source SDK for building, orchestrating, and deploying AI agents. It’s available for both .NET and Python, with stable APIs and a long-term support commitment.
